config.script:
"""
		Written By: Sagar Iparkar
		Written Date: 30/05/2024
		Purpose: Reset all values. 
	"""
	# Write your script here	
	system.perspective.closeDock('rightS')
	system.perspective.openDock("rightView")
	headerLabel = "Add"
	messageType = 'locationRoutPanel'
	system.perspective.sendMessage("deleteIsVisible",payload = {"IsVisible":0}, scope = "page")
	system.perspective.sendMessage("isEditDisplay",payload = {"IsVisible":0}, scope = "page")  
	
	self.session.custom.dsLocationRout=None
	self.session.custom.selectedMSTLocationRouteID=0
	
	payload = {'headerLabel':headerLabel,
								'MST_Area_Id':-1,
								'MST_Line_Id':-1,
								'NoOfStep':0,
								'IsActive':1,
								'Action':headerLabel,
								'ds':None}			
	system.perspective.sendMessage(messageType, payload, scope = 'page' )

"""
		Written By: Sagar Iparkar
		Written Date: 30/05/2024
		Purpose: On Line change, store station count. 
	"""
	if self.props.value > 0:
		MST_Line_Id=self.props.value
		
		params = {"MST_Line_Id":MST_Line_Id}
		ds = system.db.runNamedQuery("Project_VECV/LocationRouting/GetLineWiseWorkStation",params)
		ds=system.dataset.toPyDataSet(ds)
		self.parent.parent.getChild("cntSeqNumber").getChild("lbl_NoOfSation").meta.visible=False
		self.parent.parent.getChild("cntSeqNumber").getChild("lbl_NoOfSation").props.text=""
		noOfStationCount=len(ds)
		system.perspective.print("ds--> %s"%ds)
		system.perspective.print("noOfStationCount--> %s"%noOfStationCount)
		raneg="1 - "+str(noOfStationCount)
		if len(ds)>0:
			self.parent.parent.getChild("cntSeqNumber").getChild("lbl_NoOfSation").props.text=raneg
			self.parent.parent.getChild("cntSeqNumber").getChild("lbl_NoOfSation").meta.visible=True
			self.parent.parent.getChild("cntSeqNumber").getChild("txtSeqNo").props.inputBounds.maximum=int(noOfStationCount)
		else:
			self.parent.parent.getChild("cntSeqNumber").getChild("lbl_NoOfSation").meta.visible=False
			self.parent.parent.getChild("cntSeqNumber").getChild("lbl_NoOfSation").props.text=[]
			self.parent.parent.getChild("cntSeqNumber").getChild("txtSeqNo").props.inputBounds.maximum=0

transforms.code:
pyData = system.dataset.toPyDataSet(value)
	optionList = []
	for data in pyData:
		dict = {}
		dict["value"] = data['MST_Line_Id']
		dict["label"] = data['LineName']
		optionList.append(dict)
	return optionList

config.script:
"""
		Written By: Sagar Iparkar
		Written Date: 30/05/2024
		Purpose: Add/Update location routing. 
	"""
	try:
		if self.parent.parent.getChild("cntHeader").getChild("lblHeader").props.text == 'Edit':
			actualDatalen =  len(self.session.custom.dsLocationRout)
			oldDS =  self.session.custom.dsLocationRout
			areaId=self.parent.parent.getChild("cntAreaName").getChild("drpAreaName").props.value
			lineId=self.parent.parent.getChild("cntLineName").getChild("drpLineName").props.value
	#		self.session.custom.dsLocationRout=None
	#		self.parent.parent.getChild("cntLocationTable").getChild("tblLocationRouting").props.data=None
			
			MSTLocationRouteID=self.session.custom.selectedMSTLocationRouteID
			MST_WorkStation_Id=-1
			MST_WorkStation_Ids=str([-1])
			RouteStep_Id=0
			ParallelIDs = str([-1])
			Id=0
			headers=["MST_LocationRoute_Id","SRNo","MST_WorkStation_Id","MST_Area_Id","MST_Line_Id","MST_WorkStation_Ids","RouteStep_Id","Id","Step","Parallel","ParallelIDs"]
			data=[]
			seqNumber=self.parent.parent.getChild("cntSeqNumber").getChild("txtSeqNo").props.value
			system.perspective.print("MSTLocationRouteID "+str(MSTLocationRouteID))
			target = seqNumber - actualDatalen
			srno=actualDatalen + 1
			if target > 0: 
				for i in range(target):
					step="Step-"+str(srno)
					
		#			if MSTLocationRouteID!=0 and str(MSTLocationRouteID)!=None and str(MSTLocationRouteID).strip().lower()!='none':
		#				RouteStep_Id=self.session.custom.dsLocationRout[i-1]['RouteStep_Id']
		#				pass
		#			RouteStep_Id=0	
					data.append([MSTLocationRouteID,srno,MST_WorkStation_Id,areaId,lineId,MST_WorkStation_Ids,RouteStep_Id,Id,step,0,ParallelIDs])
					srno=srno+1
				ds=system.dataset.toDataSet(headers, data)	
				ds=system.dataset.toPyDataSet(ds)
				comboData  = system.dataset.appendDataset(oldDS, ds)
				if len(ds)>0:
					self.parent.parent.getChild("cntLocationTable").getChild("tblLocationRouting").props.data=comboData	
					self.session.custom.dsLocationRout=comboData
					system.perspective.sendMessage("TableRefreshLR",payload = {}, scope = "page")	
				else:
					self.session.custom.dsLocationRout=None
					self.parent.parent.getChild("cntLocationTable").getChild("tblLocationRouting").props.data=None
					system.perspective.sendMessage("TableRefreshLR",payload = {}, scope = "page")	
			else:
				actuallen = len(self.session.custom.dsLocationRout)
				ds = self.session.custom.dsLocationRout
				target = target * -1
				for i in range(target):
					self.session.custom.dsLocationRout = system.dataset.deleteRow(ds, (actuallen - 1))
					ds = self.session.custom.dsLocationRout
					ds = system.dataset.toPyDataSet(ds)
					actuallen = len(ds)
				self.parent.parent.getChild("cntLocationTable").getChild("tblLocationRouting").props.data=ds
				self.session.custom.dsLocationRout=ds
		else:
			areaId=self.parent.parent.getChild("cntAreaName").getChild("drpAreaName").props.value
			lineId=self.parent.parent.getChild("cntLineName").getChild("drpLineName").props.value
			self.session.custom.dsLocationRout=None
			self.parent.parent.getChild("cntLocationTable").getChild("tblLocationRouting").props.data=None
			
			MSTLocationRouteID=self.session.custom.selectedMSTLocationRouteID
			MST_WorkStation_Id=-1
			MST_WorkStation_Ids=str([-1])
			ParallelIDs = str([-1])
			RouteStep_Id=0
			Id=0
			headers=["MST_LocationRoute_Id","SRNo","MST_WorkStation_Id","MST_Area_Id","MST_Line_Id","MST_WorkStation_Ids","RouteStep_Id","Id","Step","Parallel","ParallelIDs"]
			data=[]
			seqNumber=self.parent.parent.getChild("cntSeqNumber").getChild("txtSeqNo").props.value
			srno=1
			system.perspective.print("MSTLocationRouteID "+str(MSTLocationRouteID))
			for i in range(seqNumber):
				step="Step-"+str(srno)
				
	#			if MSTLocationRouteID!=0 and str(MSTLocationRouteID)!=None and str(MSTLocationRouteID).strip().lower()!='none':
	#				RouteStep_Id=self.session.custom.dsLocationRout[i-1]['RouteStep_Id']
	#				pass
	#			RouteStep_Id=0	
				data.append([MSTLocationRouteID,srno,MST_WorkStation_Id,areaId,lineId,MST_WorkStation_Ids,RouteStep_Id,Id,step,0,ParallelIDs])
				srno=srno+1
			
			system.perspective.print("Dataset:%s"%data)
			ds=system.dataset.toDataSet(headers, data)	
			ds=system.dataset.toPyDataSet(ds)
			system.perspective.print("Dataset after:%s"%ds)
			if len(ds)>0:
				self.parent.parent.getChild("cntLocationTable").getChild("tblLocationRouting").props.data=ds	
				self.session.custom.dsLocationRout=ds
				system.perspective.sendMessage("TableRefreshLR",payload = {}, scope = "page")	
			else:
				self.session.custom.dsLocationRout=None
				self.parent.parent.getChild("cntLocationTable").getChild("tblLocationRouting").props.data=None
				system.perspective.sendMessage("TableRefreshLR",payload = {}, scope = "page")	
	except:
		screenName ='LocationRoutingConfigurationPanel'   
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/Pannel/LocationRoutingConfigurationPanel')  
		errorFunction = str('Event:onActionPerformed  ->viewbtn')  
		errorType=str('Application')  
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())   
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description 
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error 
		system.perspective.print("errorFunction: "+str(errorFunction)+" description: "+str(description)+" lineno: "+str(lineNumber))
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber)

"""
		Written By: Sagar Iparkar
		Written Date: 30/05/2024
		Purpose: Save location routing data into db. 
	"""
	try:

		MST_Area_Id=self.parent.parent.getChild("cntAreaName").getChild("drpAreaName").props.value
		MST_Line_Id=self.parent.parent.getChild("cntLineName").getChild("drpLineName").props.value
		NoOfStep=self.parent.parent.getChild("cntSeqNumber").getChild("txtSeqNo").props.value
		dsLocationRout=self.session.custom.dsLocationRout
		IsActive = self.parent.parent.getChild("cntIsActive").getChild("drpIsActive").props.value
		count=1
		flagFE=0
		flagVS=0
		listWS=[]
#		dsLocationRout=self.parent.parent.getChild("cntLocationTable").getChild("tblLocationRouting").props.data
		dsLocationRout = system.dataset.toPyDataSet(dsLocationRout)
		for i in dsLocationRout:		
			WorkStation_Id=i['MST_WorkStation_Id']
			system.perspective.print("WorkStation_Id validation "+str(WorkStation_Id))
			if WorkStation_Id in listWS:
				flagVS=1
				break	
			if 	WorkStation_Id=='' or WorkStation_Id==-1 or WorkStation_Id <=0 or WorkStation_Id==None:
				flagFE=1
				break
			listWS.append(WorkStation_Id)
#		if 	flagFE==1:	
#			message="Please fill Work Station"
#			state = "warning"
#			Project_VECV.PopUp.Alerts.showAlert(str(state), str(state.capitalize()), str(message), "true", "Okay", "", "", "", "", "closePopup", "closePopup", "closePopup","","","","")	
		if 	flagVS==1:	
				message="Please Enter Valid Work Station Sequence"
				state = "warning"
				Project_VECV.PopUp.Alerts.showAlert(str(state), str(state.capitalize()), str(message), "true", "Okay", "", "", "", "", "closePopup", "closePopup", "closePopup","","","","")		
		else:		
			for i in dsLocationRout:
				LocationRoute_Id=i['MST_LocationRoute_Id']
				RouteStep_Id=i['RouteStep_Id']
				WorkStation_Id=i['MST_WorkStation_Id']
				system.perspective.print("WorkStation_Ids----->%s"%WorkStation_Id)
				Id=i['Id']
				StepNumber=i['SRNo']
				PrevWorkStation_Id=str(i['MST_WorkStation_Ids'])
				
				ParallelIDs=str(i['ParallelIDs'])
				ParallelIDs=ParallelIDs.replace('<ArrayWrapper>:','')
				ParallelIDs=ParallelIDs.replace('L','')
				ParallelIDs=ParallelIDs.replace('[','')
				ParallelIDs=ParallelIDs.replace(']','')
				if str(ParallelIDs) == '-1' or str(ParallelIDs).upper() == 'None'.upper() or str(ParallelIDs) == '':
					ParallelIDs = ''
				ParallelIDs='"'+str(ParallelIDs)+'"'
	
				PrevWorkStation_Id=PrevWorkStation_Id.replace('<ArrayWrapper>:','')
				PrevWorkStation_Id=PrevWorkStation_Id.replace('L','')
				PrevWorkStation_Id=PrevWorkStation_Id.replace('[','')
				PrevWorkStation_Id=PrevWorkStation_Id.replace(']','')
				if str(PrevWorkStation_Id) == '-1' or str(PrevWorkStation_Id).upper() == 'None'.upper():
					PrevWorkStation_Id = ''
				PrevWorkStation_Id='"'+str(PrevWorkStation_Id)+'"'
				if count==1:
					json='[{"LocationRoute_Id":'+str(LocationRoute_Id)+',"RouteStep_Id":'+str(RouteStep_Id)+',"WorkStation_Id":'+str(WorkStation_Id)+',"Id":'+str(Id)+',"StepNumber":'+str(StepNumber)+',"PrevWorkStation_Id":'+str(PrevWorkStation_Id)+',"ParallelStation":'+str(ParallelIDs)+'}'
			  	else:
			  		json=json+',{"LocationRoute_Id":'+str(LocationRoute_Id)+',"RouteStep_Id":'+str(RouteStep_Id)+',"WorkStation_Id":'+str(WorkStation_Id)+',"Id":'+str(Id)+',"StepNumber":'+str(StepNumber)+',"PrevWorkStation_Id":'+str(PrevWorkStation_Id)+',"ParallelStation":'+str(ParallelIDs)+'}'
		  		count=count+1
			json=json +"]"
			if self.parent.parent.getChild("cntHeader").getChild("lblHeader").props.text == 'Add':
				CreatedBy = self.session.custom.loggedInUserId
				MST_LocationRoute_Id=0
				Id=0
				
				params = {"MST_Area_Id":int(MST_Area_Id),"MST_Line_Id": int(MST_Line_Id),"jsondata":json,"NoOfStep": int(NoOfStep),"IsActive":int(IsActive),"ModifiedBy":int(CreatedBy),"MST_LocationRoute_Id":int(MST_LocationRoute_Id)}
				system.perspective.print("params "+str(params))
				result = system.db.runNamedQuery("Project_VECV/LocationRouting/AddUpdateLocationRouting",params)
				result=result[0][0]
				system.perspective.print("add result  "+str(result))
				result=str(result)
				if(result!='1' and result!='2') :
					if result.strip().lower()=='Duplicate Location Routing Not allowed'.strip().lower():
						message='Location Routing Already Configure Duplicate Not Allowed'
					else:	
						message = str("Location Routing Not Added")
					state = "warning"
				elif(result=='1' or result=='2'):
					message = "Location Routing added successfully."
					state = "success"
					auditMsg=message + " for AreaID=" + str(MST_Area_Id) + ",LindID=" + str(MST_Line_Id) + ",WorkStationID=" + str(WorkStation_Id)
			else:
				ModifiedBy = self.session.custom.loggedInUserId
				groupConfigurationID = self.session.custom.selectedMSTGroupConfigID
				CreatedBy = self.session.custom.loggedInUserId
				
				MST_LocationRoute_Id=self.session.custom.selectedMSTLocationRouteID
				Id=MST_LocationRoute_Id
				system.perspective.print("json %s"%json)
				params = {"MST_Area_Id":int(MST_Area_Id),"MST_Line_Id": int(MST_Line_Id),"jsondata":json,"NoOfStep": int(NoOfStep),"IsActive":int(IsActive),"ModifiedBy":int(CreatedBy),"MST_LocationRoute_Id":int(MST_LocationRoute_Id)}
				system.perspective.print("params "+str(params))
				result = system.db.runNamedQuery("Project_VECV/LocationRouting/AddUpdateLocationRouting",params)
				result=result[0][0]
				result=str(result)
				system.perspective.print("update result  "+str(result))
	#			result=str(result[0][0]).strip()
				if(result!='1' and result!='2'):
					message = str("Location Routing Update Failed")
					state = "warning"
				elif(result=='1' or result=='2'):
					message = "Location Routing Updated successfully."
					state = "success"	
					auditMsg=message
			Project_VECV.PopUp.Alerts.showAlert(str(state), str(state.capitalize()), str(message), "true", "Okay", "", "", "", "", "closePopup", "closePopup", "closePopup","","","","")	
			system.perspective.closeDock('rightp')
			system.perspective.openDock("rightView")
			messageType = 'tableRefresh'    	 			
			system.perspective.sendMessage(messageType,scope = 'page' )
			self.parent.parent.getChild("cntAreaName").getChild("drpAreaName").props.value=-1
			self.parent.parent.getChild("cntLineName").getChild("drpLineName").props.value=-1
			self.parent.parent.getChild("cntSeqNumber").getChild("txtSeqNo").props.value=0
			self.parent.parent.getChild("cntLocationTable").getChild("tblLocationRouting").props.data=None		
			self.session.custom.dsLocationRout=None
			self.session.custom.selectedMSTLocationRouteID=0
			
			#addToAuditLogStrat
			system.perspective.print(auditMsg)
			category='Master Configuration'
			subCategory='LocationRouting Configuration'
			if(Id!=0):
				prevDesc=self.view.getChild("root").custom.payload
				curDesc = {
					"MST_Area_Id":MST_Area_Id,
					"MST_Line_Id":MST_Line_Id,
					"NoOfStep":NoOfStep,
					"IsActive":IsActive,
					"MST_LocationRoute_Id":LocationRoute_Id,
					"MST_RouteStep_Id":RouteStep_Id,
					"MST_WorkStation_Id":WorkStation_Id
				}
				import json
				curDesc_json = json.dumps(curDesc)
				curDesc=curDesc_json
				system.perspective.print(prevDesc)
				system.perspective.print(curDesc)
				description=str(auditMsg)+" Where ID="+str(Id)+" With Previous Data->"+str(prevDesc)+" and Updated Data->"+str(curDesc)
			else:
				description=str(auditMsg)
			createdBy=self.session.custom.loggedInUserId
			Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddAuditLogs(category, subCategory, description, createdBy)
			#addAuditLogEnd
			
			
	except:
		screenName ='LocationRoutingPanel'   
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/Pannel/LocationRouting')  
		errorFunction = str('Event:onActionPerformed  ->cntSave/btn_Save')  
		errorType=str('Application')  
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())   
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description 
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error 
		system.perspective.print("errorFunction: "+str(errorFunction)+" description: "+str(description)+" lineno: "+str(lineNumber))
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber)

messageHandlers.script:
# implement your handler here
#	system.perspective.print("Into messageHandler----------->")
	load=payload.copy()
#	system.perspective.print("Printing payload of msg handler----------->")
#	system.perspective.print(payload)
	load.pop('headerLabel')
	load.pop('Action')
	load.pop('Additional_WorkStation')
	load.pop('Additional_WorkStationId')
	load.pop('ds')
	
#	system.perspective.print("msg handler1----------->")
	import json
	load_json = json.dumps(load)
	self.view.getChild("root").custom.payload=load_json
#	system.perspective.print("msg handler2----------->")
#	system.perspective.print("payload msghandler3------------->")
#	system.perspective.print(self.view.getChild("root").custom.payload)

config.script:
"""
		Written By: Sagar Iparkar
		Written Date: 30/05/2024
		Purpose: Reset all values. 
	"""
	# Write your script here	
	system.perspective.closeDock('rightS')
	system.perspective.openDock("rightView")
	headerLabel = "Add"
	messageType = 'locationRoutPanel'
	system.perspective.sendMessage("deleteIsVisible",payload = {"IsVisible":0}, scope = "page")
	system.perspective.sendMessage("isEditDisplay",payload = {"IsVisible":0}, scope = "page")  
	payload = {'headerLabel':headerLabel,
								'MST_Area_Id':-1,
								'MST_Line_Id':-1,
								'NoOfStep':0,
								'IsActive':1,
								'Action':headerLabel,
								'ds':None}			
	system.perspective.sendMessage(messageType, payload, scope = 'page' )
	self.session.custom.dsLocationRout=None
	self.session.custom.selectedMSTLocationRouteID=0

messageHandlers.script:
# implement your handler here
	self.props.data=self.session.custom.dsLocationRout
	table=self.getSibling("Table")
	table.refreshBinding("props.data")
	
	system.perspective.sendMessage("tableRow",payload = {"Index":-1}, scope = "page")

# implement your handler here
	self.props.selection.selectedRow = payload['Index']

"""
		Written By: Sagar Iparkar
		Written Date: 30/05/2024
		Purpose: Store updated location route data in custom dataset. 
	"""
	try:
		scriptName="message handler UpdateLocationRout"
		no=payload['No']
		selRow=payload['SelctedRow']
		selColumn=payload['columnName']
#		if selColumn=="MST_WorkStation_Ids":
#			no='<ArrayWrapper>: [269L]'
#			no=no.replace('<ArrayWrapper>:','')
#			no=no.replace('L','')
		updateRowResultDs = {selColumn:no}
		system.perspective.print("payload %s"%payload)
		
		system.perspective.print("updateRowResultDs "+str(updateRowResultDs))
		dtSet=self.session.custom.dsLocationRout
		resultpyData = system.dataset.updateRow(dtSet,selRow,updateRowResultDs)	
		ds= system.dataset.toPyDataSet(resultpyData)	
		self.session.custom.dsLocationRout=ds
		system.perspective.print("self.session.custom.dsLocationRout = "+str(self.session.custom.dsLocationRout[selRow][selColumn]))
#		system.perspective.sendMessage("LocationRoutTableRefresh", scope = "page")
	except:
		screenName ='UpdateLocationRout'
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/Pannel/LocationRoutingConfigurationPanel')  
		errorFunction = str('Event on message handler  -> UpdateLocationRout')  
		errorType=str('Application')  
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())   
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description 
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error 
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber)

"""
		Written By: Sagar Iparkar
		Written Date: 30/05/2024
		Purpose: Insert row values into db. 
	"""
	# implement your handler here
	try:
		system.perspective.print("Header label:%s"%self.session.custom.type)
		if 	payload['headerLabel']=='Add':	
			self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntHeader").getChild("lblHeader").props.text ='Add'
			self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntAreaName").getChild("drpAreaName").props.value = -1
			self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntLineName").getChild("drpLineName").props.value = -1
			self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntSeqNumber").getChild("txtSeqNo").props.value = 0
			self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntIsActive").getChild("drpIsActive").props.value = 1
			self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntSave").getChild("btn_Save").props.text = 'Add'
			self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntLocationTable").getChild("tblLocationRouting").props.data=None
			self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntSeqNumber").getChild("lbl_NoOfSation").meta.visible=False
			self.session.custom.dsLocationRout=None
			self.session.custom.selectedMSTLocationRouteID=0
			self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntAreaName").getChild("drpAreaName").props.enabled=True
			self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntLineName").getChild("drpLineName").props.enabled=True
		else:
			self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntHeader").getChild("lblHeader").props.text = payload['headerLabel']
			self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntAreaName").getChild("drpAreaName").props.value = payload['MST_Area_Id']
			self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntLineName").getChild("drpLineName").props.value = payload['MST_Line_Id']
			self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntSeqNumber").getChild("txtSeqNo").props.value = payload['NoOfStep']
			self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntIsActive").getChild("drpIsActive").props.value = payload['IsActive']
			self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntSave").getChild("btn_Save").props.text = payload['Action']
			self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntLocationTable").getChild("tblLocationRouting").props.data= payload['ds']
		if payload['headerLabel']=='Add':
			self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntSeqNumber").getChild("lbl_NoOfSation").meta.visible=False
			self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntSeqNumber").getChild("lbl_NoOfSation").props.text=''
			
			self.session.custom.dsLocationRout=None
			self.session.custom.selectedMSTLocationRouteID=0
			self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntAreaName").getChild("drpAreaName").props.enabled=True
			self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntLineName").getChild("drpLineName").props.enabled=True
		else:
			self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntAreaName").getChild("drpAreaName").props.enabled=False
			self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntLineName").getChild("drpLineName").props.enabled=False
			
			MST_Line_Id=self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntLineName").getChild("drpLineName").props.value
			
			params = {"MST_Line_Id":MST_Line_Id}
			ds = system.db.runNamedQuery("Project_VECV/LocationRouting/GetLineWiseWorkStation",params)
			ds=system.dataset.toPyDataSet(ds)
			noOfStationCount=len(ds)
			steprange="1 - "+str(noOfStationCount)
			self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntSeqNumber").getChild("lbl_NoOfSation").props.text=steprange
			self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntSeqNumber").getChild("lbl_NoOfSation").meta.visible=True
			self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntSeqNumber").getChild("txtSeqNo").props.inputBounds.maximum=int(noOfStationCount)
			MSTLocationRouteID=self.session.custom.selectedMSTLocationRouteID
			params={'AreaID':-1,'LineID':-1,'MST_LocationRoute_Id':MSTLocationRouteID}
			ds=system.db.runNamedQuery("Project_VECV/LocationRouting/getLocationRouting",params)
			ds=system.dataset.toPyDataSet(ds)
			
			
			MST_WorkStation_Id=-1
			MST_WorkStation_Ids=str([-1])
			RouteStep_Id=0
			Id=0
			headers=["MST_LocationRoute_Id","SRNo","MST_WorkStation_Id","MST_Area_Id","MST_Line_Id","MST_WorkStation_Ids","RouteStep_Id","Id","Step","Parallel","ParallelIDs"]
			data=[]
			MSTLocationRouteID=self.session.custom.selectedMSTLocationRouteID
			srno=1
#			for i in range(len(ds)):
			for i in ds:
				MST_WorkStation_Id=int(i['MST_WorkStation_Id'])
				MST_WorkStation_Ids=i['Additional_WorkStationId']
				
				RouteStep_Id=i['MST_RouteStep_Id']
				lineId=i['MST_Line_Id']
				areaId=i['MST_Area_Id']
				step="Step-"+str(srno)
				ParallelIDs = i['ParallelIDs']
				data.append([MSTLocationRouteID,srno,MST_WorkStation_Id,areaId,lineId,MST_WorkStation_Ids,RouteStep_Id,Id,step,0,ParallelIDs])
				
				srno=srno+1
			system.perspective.print("data %s -->"%data)
			ds=system.dataset.toDataSet(headers, data)	
			#ds=system.dataset.toPyDataSet(ds)
			
#			if len(ds)>0:
				
			self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntLocationTable").getChild("tblLocationRouting").props.data=ds
			self.session.custom.dsLocationRout=ds
			system.perspective.print("ds %s"%ds)
#			else:
#				self.session.custom.dsLocationRout=None
#				self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntLocationTable").getChild("tblLocationRouting").props.data=None

			
	except:
		screenName ='locationConfigurationPanel'   
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/Pannel/locationPanel')  
		errorFunction = str('messageHandler/locationPanel')  
		errorType=str('Application')  
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())   
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description 
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error 
		system.perspective.print(description)
		system.perspective.print(lineNumber)
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber)
